title: 豬嘴防具攻略更新 7093可接502蓋!! 裝修又想身體健康必入 (連購買link)

replies.msg:
以下全部都係100%防晶體+防氣體 平民裝豬嘴氣密度差少少, 全都係3M牌子
濾罐濾棉唔好濕水

平民setA :3200豬嘴+3311K

for 6200/6500/7500豬嘴: 以下3選1
filter set A: 6001 / 6006 + 502 蓋 + 2091 /2096 OR 7093( 有防水盒)
(2291, 2296都得 新一代勁D)

filter set B: 60921 / 60926 (超懶人安心選擇)

filter set C: 直接加2097 ( 2297 都得, 新一代勁D)


然後加返氣密護目鏡 (泳鏡,近視泳鏡片去D記)

想安心就 火場用氣密鏡 可戴眼鏡
[url]https://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B07CQFYTCT/ref=ox_sc_act_image_1?smid=ATVPDKIKX0DER&psc=1
[/url]

購買連結

2297棉:
https://www.amazon.com/3M-Particulate-2297-Respiratory-Protection/dp/B009POHH94

60926罐:
https://www.amazon.com/3M-Cartridge-60926-Respiratory-Protection/dp/B009POHLRC/ref=sr_1_2_sspa?crid=263BB1V1XWE2J&keywords=3m+6006+cartridge&qid=1564048054&s=gateway&sprefix=3M+6006%2Caps%2C835&sr=8-2-spons&psc=1

2091棉:

2091棉:
https://www.ashop.com.hk/index.php?route=product/product&path=2&product_id=69


7093棉盒 (較平) 2對13USD
https://www.amazon.com/3M-Particulate-7093B-Respiratory-Protection/dp/B009POIG9Y/ref=sr_1_1?crid=2VXFCHFQQ8T66&keywords=3m+7093+p100+particulate+filter&qid=1564447653&s=gateway&sprefix=3M+7093%2Caps%2C333&sr=8-1


3200 3311K去樓下五金鋪問佢 6006都係
6200 6500 7500豬嘴就大間D鋪都會有 一係AMAZON買 平D
